name: Geonator Transverser
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>晶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のコーディネラル
desc:
2 Effect Monsters
This linked card and monsters it points to cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. If this card points to 2 monsters: You can switch control of those monsters. You can only use this effect of "Geonator Transverser" once per turn.
mnst_eff:

eff:

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
